parameters.query: INSERT INTO ingest_runs (source, status, metadata) VALUES ('usaspending:enrichment', 'running', '{}'::jsonb) RETURNING id;
SELECT DISTINCT agency AS awarding_agency, naics AS naics_code FROM opportunities WHERE source = 'federal:sam' AND agency IS NOT NULL AND naics IS NOT NULL AND active = TRUE LIMIT 50;

INSERT INTO award_enrichment (awarding_agency, naics_code, psc_code, recipient_name, award_amount, award_date, usaspending_award_id, raw_data) VALUES ({{ $json.awarding_agency ? `'${String($json.awarding_agency).replace(/'/g, "''")}'` : 'NULL' }}, {{ $json.naics_code ? `'${String($json.naics_code).replace(/'/g, "''")}'` : 'NULL' }}, {{ $json.psc_code ? `'${String($json.psc_code).replace(/'/g, "''")}'` : 'NULL' }}, {{ $json.recipient_name ? `'${String($json.recipient_name).replace(/'/g, "''")}'` : 'NULL' }}, {{ $json.award_amount != null ? $json.award_amount : 'NULL' }}, {{ $json.award_date ? `'${String($json.award_date).replace(/'/g, "''")}'` : 'NULL' }}, {{ $json.usaspending_award_id ? `'${String($json.usaspending_award_id).replace(/'/g, "''")}'` : 'NULL' }}, {{ $json.raw_data ? `'${JSON.stringify($json.raw_data).replace(/'/g, "''")}'::jsonb` : 'NULL' }}) ON CONFLICT (usaspending_award_id) DO UPDATE SET award_amount = EXCLUDED.award_amount, recipient_name = EXCLUDED.recipient_name, raw_data = EXCLUDED.raw_data, enriched_at = NOW();
UPDATE ingest_runs SET status = 'success', finished_at = NOW(), rows_inserted = {{ $input.all().length }} WHERE id = {{ $('Start Ingest Run').first().json.id }};
